function.name: system_run
function.description: Execute a system command directly on the PC without UI interaction. Use this as the PRIMARY method for PC tasks — it is faster, more reliable, and accessibility-friendly compared to screenshot loops. Prefer system_run over pc_activate/pc_set_text whenever the task can be expressed as a command (e.g. open a file, run a script, query system state). Requires shell_execution permission.

command.description: The executable or command to run (e.g. 'xdg-open', 'bash', 'powershell', 'python3').

args.description: Arguments to pass to the command. Each argument is a separate string.

timeout_secs.description: Maximum seconds to wait before killing the process (default: 30).
